chapter.label: Tale 113
chapter.title: An Injunction Of Abba John Of Petra

paragraphs.text: Together with my colleague, Sophronios, 1 approached Abba John of Petra and asked him lo speak a saying for us. The elder said: ‘Love poverty and continence.* I tell you that when I was at Scéré as a young man, one of the fathers had a disorder of the spleen.

They tried to find some vinegar in the four favras of Scété and not a drop was there to be found, so greal were the poverly and the continence of those who lived there.” There were about three thousand five hundred fathers there’.
